stacking_policy_note: SOC-dependent high-SOC pruning follows the manuscript-inspired AA-dominant regime: only the all-A sequence is used at or above the configured SOC threshold.

definition.A: hexagon centers overlap between carbon layers
definition.B: a shifted-layer carbon vertex is placed above/below a reference-layer hexagon center

duplicate_structure_filter_details: final top-20 selection: exact coordinate hash first, then symmetry-equivalence via pymatgen StructureMatcher until top 20 are found

ga_li_candidate_site_generation.note: GA Li candidates include input Li sites plus graphene hexagon-center hollow sites; the requested SOC denominator remains the number of Li sites in the input structure.

stacking_policy.reason: below AA-only SOC threshold; using requested stacking sequence set
